refusals.reason: This asks to claim L4 (L0-settled) assurance without an L0 confirmation. The proof level is computed from the verifier, never asserted.
refusals.safeAlternative: Run on Kermit so the anchor is independently confirmed on L0 — then the verifier may legitimately report L4. Offline runs honestly top out below L4.

plan.summary:
Refused — this cannot be done safely:
• This asks to claim L4 (L0-settled) assurance without an L0 confirmation. The proof level is computed from the verifier, never asserted. Nearest safe alternative: Run on Kermit so the anchor is independently confirmed on L0 — then the verifier may legitimately report L4. Offline runs honestly top out below L4.
